channel.title: CopyPasteLearn — Hands-on Tech Courses
channel.description: Hands-on courses and tutorials for DevOps, automation, AI, and platform engineering.

item.title: 10 Things to Do After Installing OpenClaw
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Just installed OpenClaw? Here are 10 essential setup steps to get the most out of your AI agent — from personality to automation.

item.title: Agentic AI for DevOps Teams
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Learn how agentic AI transforms DevOps workflows with autonomous agents that handle deployments, incident response, and infrastructure management.

item.title: AI Governance and Compliance
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Implement AI governance frameworks with model registries, bias monitoring, explainability tools, and regulatory compliance for the EU AI Act and beyond.

item.title: AI Infrastructure Cost Optimization
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Reduce AI infrastructure costs with GPU scheduling, model optimization, spot instances, and intelligent routing strategies for ML workloads.

item.title: AI-Native Software Development
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Explore AI-native software development practices including AI-assisted coding, automated testing, intelligent code review, and AI-driven architecture.

item.title: AI Platform Engineering Explained
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Learn what AI platform engineering is, why enterprises need it, and how to build production-grade GenAI infrastructure from scratch with proven DevOps practices.

item.title: AI Security Platform Engineering
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Build secure AI platforms with guardrails, prompt injection defense, model access controls, and observability for production LLM deployments.

item.title: AI Supercomputing Infrastructure
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Explore how GPU clusters and AI supercomputing infrastructure power modern ML training with Kubernetes orchestration and cost optimization.

item.title: Alpine Linux for Containers
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Alpine Linux produces the smallest Docker images. Learn why it's the go-to base for containers and when to use it vs Debian-slim.

item.title: Ambient Intelligence Systems
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Build ambient intelligence systems with sensor fusion, edge AI, context-aware computing, and smart environment infrastructure for workplaces.

item.title: Ansible Automation in Minutes
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: A beginner-friendly introduction to Ansible — what it is, how it works, and how to write your first playbook to automate server configuration.

item.title: Ansible Automation Platform Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform explained. Compare AAP vs open-source Ansible, learn Controller, Hub, and EE architecture.

item.title: Ansible Exercises for Beginners
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Practice Ansible with hands-on exercises. From basic playbooks to roles and Vault, build real automation skills step by step.

item.title: Ansible Galaxy Roles Collections
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Use Ansible Galaxy to find, install, and manage reusable roles and collections. Learn requirements files, version pinning, and publishing your own content to Galaxy.

item.title: Ansible Handlers and Notifications
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Master Ansible handlers for triggered actions. Learn to restart services, flush handlers, use handler chains, and implement idempotent notification patterns.

item.title: Ansible Infrastructure as Code Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Use Ansible as your Infrastructure as Code tool. Learn how playbooks define, version, and automate your entire infrastructure.

item.title: Ansible Inventory Management Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Master Ansible inventory management with static and dynamic inventories, host groups, variables, patterns, and seamless cloud provider integration for automation.

item.title: Ansible Inventory: Static and Dynamic
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Master Ansible inventory in INI and YAML formats. Learn host groups, variables, dynamic inventory plugins for AWS and Azure, and patterns for scaling automation.

item.title: Ansible Jinja2 Templates Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Master Jinja2 templates in Ansible for dynamic configuration. Variables, filters, loops, conditionals, and real-world config file generation examples for DevOps.

item.title: Ansible Playbook for Docker Install
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Automate Docker installation on Ubuntu and RHEL with an Ansible playbook. Includes Compose plugin and post-install steps.

item.title: Ansible Playbook Error Handling
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Handle errors gracefully in Ansible playbooks. Learn ignore_errors, rescue blocks, retries, assertions, and proven recovery patterns for reliable automation.

item.title: Ansible Roles Reusable Automation
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Structure Ansible automation with roles for reusability. Directory layout, defaults, handlers, Galaxy integration, and testing with Molecule for production-ready code.

item.title: Ansible Vault: Encrypt Secrets Safely
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Learn Ansible Vault to encrypt passwords, API keys, and variables. Covers vault create, edit, encrypt_string, and CI/CD usage.

item.title: Ansible Vault Secrets Encryption
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Encrypt secrets with Ansible Vault for secure automation. Cover file encryption, string-level vaulting, multi-password setups, and CI/CD pipeline integration.

item.title: Ansible vs Terraform vs Puppet Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Compare Ansible, Terraform, and Puppet for infrastructure automation. Understand when to use each tool and how they complement each other in modern DevOps workflows.

item.title: Ansible vs Terraform When to Use
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Ansible and Terraform solve different infrastructure problems. Learn when to use each, when to use both together, and how they complement each other in real-world DevOps workflows.

item.title: Arch Linux: Full Control DIY
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Arch Linux gives you complete control over every package and configuration. Learn what makes Arch unique and whether it's right for you in 2026.

item.title: Argo Events Kubernetes Automation
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Argo Events triggers Kubernetes workflows from webhooks, message queues, S3 uploads, and cron schedules. Learn how to build event-driven automation pipelines with sensors and triggers.

item.title: Argo Rollouts Progressive Delivery
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Argo Rollouts adds canary releases and blue-green deployments to Kubernetes with automated analysis and rollback. Learn how to set up progressive delivery with traffic shifting and metrics-based promotion.

item.title: Argo Workflows Kubernetes Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Argo Workflows runs complex DAG-based workflows on Kubernetes. Learn how to build multi-step pipelines for data processing, ML training, CI/CD, and infrastructure automation.

item.title: Autonomous Industrial Systems
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Deploy and manage autonomous industrial systems with IIoT platforms, digital twins, predictive maintenance, and industrial DevOps practices.

item.title: AWS IAM Roles and Policies Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Understand AWS IAM roles, policies, and best practices for secure cloud access. Least privilege principles, role assumption, and Terraform IAM automation patterns.

item.title: Backstage Developer Portal Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Spotify Backstage is the most popular open-source developer portal. Learn how to set it up, create software templates, build a service catalog, and integrate with your existing tools.

item.title: Backstage Software Catalog Setup
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Backstage's software catalog gives you a single inventory of all services, APIs, and infrastructure. Learn how to register components, define system models, and build a searchable developer portal.

item.title: Bash Scripting for DevOps
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Essential Bash scripting skills for DevOps engineers. Variables, conditionals, loops, functions, error handling, and practical automation scripts for daily operations.

item.title: Benthos Stream Processing Pipeline
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Benthos (now Redpanda Connect) is a declarative stream processor for ETL, data transformation, and message routing. Learn how to build data pipelines connecting Kafka, S3, databases, and APIs.

item.title: Best Linux Distro for Servers
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Comparing the top Linux distributions for server deployments in 2026: Debian, Ubuntu Server, RHEL, Rocky Linux, and Alpine. Which one fits your needs?

item.title: Blameless Postmortems Template
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Run effective blameless postmortems with our ready-to-use template. Learn the structured process and turn production incidents into lasting system improvements.

item.title: Boundary Zero Trust Access Manager
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: HashiCorp Boundary provides identity-based access to infrastructure without VPNs or SSH keys. Learn how Boundary replaces bastion hosts and VPNs with just-in-time, audited access to databases and servers.

item.title: Building Custom OpenClaw Skills
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Learn how to create, package, and share custom skills for OpenClaw agents. From simple automations to complex integrations.

item.title: Building REST APIs with Node.js
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Learn how to build production-ready REST APIs with Node.js and Express — routing, middleware, error handling, and best practices.

item.title: Buildpacks vs Dockerfiles Comparison
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Cloud Native Buildpacks automatically detect and build your app without a Dockerfile. Compare Buildpacks and Dockerfiles for build speed, security, and developer experience.

item.title: Cert Manager Kubernetes TLS Guide
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Cert-manager automates TLS certificate management in Kubernetes with Let's Encrypt. Learn how to install cert-manager, configure issuers, and secure your ingress with automatic certificate renewal.

item.title: Chainguard Enforce Supply Chain
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Chainguard Enforce validates container supply chain integrity in Kubernetes using SLSA provenance, SBOMs, and image signatures. Learn how to enforce supply chain policies across your clusters.

item.title: Checkov Infrastructure as Code Scan
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Checkov scans Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, and Dockerfile for security misconfigurations with 1000+ built-in policies. Learn how to integrate Checkov into CI/CD and write custom checks.

item.title: CI/CD for ML on Kubernetes
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Build a CI/CD pipeline for ML models using GitHub Actions, MLflow, Docker, and Kubernetes. Automate the path from training to production.

item.title: CI/CD Pipeline Tutorial from Scratch
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Build a complete CI/CD pipeline from scratch with GitHub Actions. Lint, test, build, and deploy your application — fully automated on every push to your repository.

item.title: Cilium Service Mesh Kubernetes
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Cilium replaces kube-proxy and sidecar service meshes with eBPF. Learn how Cilium handles networking, observability, and security in Kubernetes without sidecar containers.

item.title: Coder Remote Development Platform
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Coder provisions cloud development environments on Kubernetes, AWS, or any infrastructure. Learn how Coder replaces local dev setups with consistent, powerful remote workspaces.

item.title: Confidential Computing Explained
item.dc:creator: Luca Berton
item.description: Understand confidential computing with TEEs, secure enclaves, and practical deployment patterns for protecting sensitive workloads in cloud environments.
